src: A ring with a vibrant pink gemstone set in a rectangular halo surrounded by small white diamonds. The band is rose gold, encrusted with matching diamonds, creating a sparkling and elegant appearance.
edit: A ring with a striking combination of jade and amber stones. The central rectangular jade is framed by small amber stones. The band features matching amber accents, giving it an earthy, exotic appearance.

per_image_non_shared_src.sabrianna-EOAaLXkPyGA-unsplash: The object is positioned with a front view, showcasing the pink gemstone against a smooth pink gradient background with subtle color variations.
per_image_non_shared_src.sabrianna-LlEH4GL5iow-unsplash: The object is angled from the side, resting on a flat surface, with a plain white background highlighting the intricate details of the stone and setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.sabrianna-V3RCa8hZqPc-unsplash: The object rests at a tilted angle, emphasizing the stone's facets. The plain white background accentuates the ring’s sparkling elements.
per_image_non_shared_src.sabrianna-uiKSc7-NM2s-unsplash: The object is placed in a side-angled position, flat against a white surface. The background remains unobtrusive, focusing attention on the gemstone’s brilliance.
per_image_non_shared_src.sabrianna-yEJwDxAoHc0-unsplash: The object is showcased at a tilted angle on a white background, enhancing the view of the gemstone and the detailed setting.

prompt_shared: a ring with jade and amber stones
